tripOverview.intro: San Juan captivates with its colorful colonial architecture, pristine beaches, and vibrant Caribbean culture. This enchanting Puerto Rican capital offers the perfect blend of historic charm and tropical romance.
tripOverview.vibe: A perfect romantic escape blending historic charm with pristine beaches and vibrant LGBTQ+-friendly nightlife.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April offers ideal weather with warm temperatures, minimal rainfall, and perfect beach conditions.

attractions.name: Old San Juan
attractions.desc: Historic colonial district with colorful buildings and cobblestone streets.

attractions.name: El Yunque National Forest
attractions.desc: Tropical rainforest with waterfalls and hiking trails.

attractions.name: Condado Beach
attractions.desc: Popular beach with calm waters and beachfront dining.

destinationOverview.transportation: Public buses (AMA) connect major areas for $0.75 per ride. Taxis are readily available with fixed rates to popular destinations, while Uber operates throughout the metro area. Walking is ideal in Old San Juan, but rideshare is recommended for beach hopping.
destinationOverview.tip: Download the Uber app before arrival as it's more reliable than street taxis, and always carry small bills for public transportation.
destinationOverview.safety: San Juan is generally safe for tourists, especially in well-traveled areas like Old San Juan and Condado.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with affordable eSIM data plans for seamless navigation and sharing your romantic Puerto Rican moments.

days.intro: Start your romantic Puerto Rican adventure exploring the enchanting cobblestone streets of historic Old San Juan.

morning.name: Arrival at Luis Muñoz Marín Airport
morning.desc: Land and take Uber to hotel in Condado area.

morning.name: Hotel Check-in
morning.desc: Settle into your romantic beachfront accommodation.

afternoon.name: Old San Juan Walking Tour
afternoon.desc: Explore colorful colonial buildings and historic plazas.

afternoon.name: Castillo San Cristóbal
afternoon.desc: Visit the impressive Spanish fortress with ocean views.

evening.name: Dinner at Café Puerto Rico
evening.desc: Enjoy traditional Puerto Rican cuisine in a historic setting.

evening.name: Evening Stroll in Old San Juan
evening.desc: Romantic walk through illuminated colonial streets.

days.tip: Wear comfortable walking shoes for Old San Juan's cobblestone streets and bring a light jacket for evening ocean breezes.

days.intro: Spend a blissful day soaking up the sun at beautiful Condado Beach with its calm turquoise waters.

morning.name: Breakfast at Panadería España
morning.desc: Start with fresh pastries and Puerto Rican coffee.

morning.name: Condado Beach Setup
morning.desc: Rent beach chairs and umbrellas for the day.

afternoon.name: Beach Lunch at Oceano
afternoon.desc: Oceanfront dining with vegetarian options and cocktails.

evening.name: Condado Beach Sunset
evening.desc: Romantic sunset viewing from the beach.

evening.name: Dinner at Verde Mesa
evening.desc: Farm-to-table vegetarian restaurant with romantic ambiance.

days.tip: Apply sunscreen frequently and stay hydrated - the Caribbean sun is stronger than it appears.

days.intro: Discover the magical El Yunque National Forest with its lush rainforest trails and stunning waterfalls.

morning.name: Early Breakfast at Hotel
morning.desc: Fuel up for a day of hiking and exploration.

morning.name: El Yunque Guided Tour
morning.desc: Professional guide leads you through rainforest trails and waterfalls.

afternoon.name: Yokahu Tower Climb
afternoon.desc: Panoramic views of the rainforest canopy.

evening.name: Return to San Juan
evening.desc: Relax during the scenic drive back to the city.

evening.name: Dinner at Santaella
evening.desc: Contemporary Puerto Rican cuisine with vegetarian options.

days.tip: Wear quick-dry clothing and waterproof shoes - you'll encounter mist and potentially light rain in the rainforest.

days.intro: Experience the pristine white sands and crystal-clear waters of Isla Verde, perfect for a romantic beach day.

morning.name: Coffee at Hacienda San Pedro
morning.desc: Artisanal coffee roasted locally with light breakfast.

morning.name: Isla Verde Beach
morning.desc: Set up at one of Puerto Rico's most beautiful beaches.

afternoon.name: Lunch at Metropol
afternoon.desc: Beachfront Cuban-Puerto Rican fusion with vegetarian plates.

afternoon.name: Water Sports
afternoon.desc: Kayaking or paddleboarding in calm waters.

evening.name: Beach Sunset Walk
evening.desc: Romantic stroll along the shoreline at golden hour.

evening.name: Dinner at Budatai
evening.desc: Asian-Latin fusion with creative vegetarian dishes.

days.tip: Isla Verde has excellent facilities and is LGBTQ+-friendly - perfect for couples looking for a comfortable beach experience.

days.intro: Immerse yourselves in Puerto Rican art, history, and culture with visits to museums and local galleries.

morning.name: Museo de Arte de Puerto Rico
morning.desc: Explore the island's finest art collection.

morning.name: Coffee at Spoon Food Tours Café
morning.desc: Local coffee and pastries between cultural sites.

afternoon.name: Lunch at Marmalade
afternoon.desc: Upscale dining with innovative vegetarian tasting menu.

afternoon.name: Casa Blanca Historic House
afternoon.desc: 16th-century mansion with gardens and harbor views.

evening.name: Paseo de la Princesa
evening.desc: Scenic waterfront promenade perfect for romantic walks.

evening.name: Dinner at Cocina Abierta
evening.desc: Creative international cuisine with excellent vegetarian options.

days.tip: Many museums offer discounts for couples, and Wednesday afternoons often have special exhibitions or events.

days.intro: Create magical memories with a sunset catamaran cruise and intimate evening in the heart of San Juan.

morning.name: Brunch at Café Manolín
morning.desc: Historic café serving traditional Puerto Rican breakfast.

morning.name: Shopping in SoFo District
morning.desc: Browse local artisan shops and galleries.

afternoon.name: Light Lunch at Chocobar Cortés
afternoon.desc: Chocolate café with vegetarian sandwiches and desserts.

afternoon.name: Sunset Catamaran Cruise
afternoon.desc: Romantic sailing with drinks and stunning sunset views.

evening.name: Return to Shore
evening.desc: Dock at San Juan Marina with unforgettable memories.

evening.name: Late Dinner at 1919
evening.desc: Fine dining with ocean views and sophisticated vegetarian menu.

days.tip: Book the catamaran cruise in advance and bring a light jacket - it gets breezy on the water during sunset.

days.intro: Savor your last day in paradise with a relaxing beach morning and farewell dinner in Old San Juan.

morning.name: Final Beach at Condado
morning.desc: Last chance to enjoy the beautiful Caribbean waters.

morning.name: Ice Cream at Ben & Jerry's Condado
morning.desc: Cool treat while lounging on the beach.

afternoon.name: Farewell Lunch at Acapulco Taquería Mexicana
afternoon.desc: Vegetarian-friendly Mexican cuisine near the beach.

afternoon.name: Hotel Pool Time
afternoon.desc: Relax by the pool and pack for departure.

evening.name: Last Old San Juan Walk
evening.desc: Final romantic stroll through historic streets.

evening.name: Farewell Dinner at Té
evening.desc: Elegant vegetarian-friendly farewell meal with ambiance.

days.tip: Pack beach clothes in carry-on for easy access, and leave time for last-minute souvenir shopping in Old San Juan.

food.intro: San Juan's culinary scene brilliantly fuses traditional Puerto Rican flavors with international influences and excellent vegetarian options.
food.tip: Most restaurants offer vegetarian options, but always confirm preparation methods to ensure they meet your dietary needs.

neighborhoods.name: Condado
neighborhoods.desc: Beachfront area with hotels, restaurants, and nightlife
neighborhoods.whyStay: Direct beach access and romantic oceanfront dining

neighborhoods.name: Old San Juan
neighborhoods.desc: Historic colonial district with charming boutique hotels
neighborhoods.whyStay: Immersive historic atmosphere and walkable attractions

neighborhoods.name: Isla Verde
neighborhoods.desc: Modern beach resort area near the airport
neighborhoods.whyStay: Beautiful beaches and easy airport access

hotels.tip: Book accommodations in Condado for the perfect balance of beach access, dining options, and LGBTQ+-friendly atmosphere.

getYourGuide.name: El Yunque Small Group Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Professional guide leads through rainforest trails with waterfall swimming opportunities.

getYourGuide.name: San Juan Food Walking Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Taste authentic Puerto Rican cuisine while exploring historic neighborhoods with local guide.

getYourGuide.name: Camuy Caves Adventure
getYourGuide.desc: Explore underground limestone caves system with expert guides and transportation included.

hiddenGems.name: La Placita de Santurce
hiddenGems.desc: Local nightlife square with authentic bars and LGBTQ+-friendly atmosphere.

hiddenGems.name: Cueva Ventana
hiddenGems.desc: Cave with stunning window-like opening overlooking valleys and mountains.

hiddenGems.name: Mosquito Bay Vieques
hiddenGems.desc: World's brightest bioluminescent bay accessible by short flight or ferry.

packing.title: April in San Juan, Puerto Rico
packing.intro: Pack for warm tropical weather with occasional light showers and strong Caribbean sun.
packing.luggage: A medium suitcase plus carry-on should suffice for a week-long tropical getaway.
packing.tip: Pack reef-safe sunscreen to protect the marine environment and bring a waterproof bag for beach days.

bookTrip.intro: Flights from Philadelphia to San Juan typically range from $300-500 per person depending on booking timing.
